text: Does the P&P require that HEDIS data collection and reporting for Medi-Cal and OneCare programs comply with CMS and DHCS requirements?

claims.claim: MCPs must collect and report HEDIS data in compliance with CMS and DHCS requirements.
claims.source_text: HEDIS data collection and reporting shall comply with CMS and DHCS requirements

text: Does the P&P require the Plan to designate a primary and back-up HEDIS lead as a liaison with DHCS?

claims.claim: The Plan must name a primary and back-up HEDIS lead who serves as liaison to DHCS.
claims.source_text: a designated and back-up HEDIS lead

text: Does the P&P establish that minor, non-substantive revisions to the Compliance Plan require prior Board of Directors approval before taking effect?

claims.claim: Minor, non-substantive revisions to the Compliance Plan require prior Board of Directors approval.
claims.source_text: minor, non-substantive revisions to the Compliance Plan require Board of Directors approval

text: Does the P&P require the Compliance Officer to be independent of operational functions and not serve in a dual compliance-and-operations role?

claims.claim: The Compliance Officer must be independent and must not serve in both a compliance and operational role.
claims.source_text: the Compliance Officer is considered independent and does not serve in both a compliance and operational role

text: Does the P&P establish whistleblower protections that prohibit retaliation against employees who report suspected compliance violations?

claims.claim: Employees reporting suspected compliance violations must be protected from retaliation.
claims.source_text: protect employees reporting suspected compliance violations from retaliation

text: Does the P&P require the Compliance Program to be reviewed and updated at least annually?

claims.claim: The Compliance Program must be reviewed and updated at least annually.
claims.source_text: shall refresh the Compliance Program at minimum once per year
